heading: Biennial report to Congress
label: 6309 Biennial report to Congress

children.heading: .—Report Required
children.label: a .—Report Required
children.text: The Secretary shall, not later than December 1 of every even-numbered year (beginning in 2008), submit to Congress a report on the outreach activities carried out by the Department.
A description of the implementation during the preceding fiscal year of the current biennial plan under .section 6302 of this title
Recommendations for the improvement or more effective administration of the outreach activities of the Department.
